since_last: 68% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +1.23%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC -0.79% · Gold +0.27% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 68% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +1.23%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +1.23%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +7.79%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +7.79%, POWL +4.19%, BIDU +3.79%, BABA +3.67%, SKHY +3.33%. Laggards: SYM -1.73%, SAP -0.77%, SMR -0.65%, NXE -0.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.38% at $125.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
